overall.description: A first-person walk through a rainy cyberpunk city at night, featuring neon-lit streets, vending machines, and pedestrians. The footage appears to be from a video game (Cyberpunk 2077), showcasing detailed urban environments with wet reflective surfaces and atmospheric lighting.

segments.scene_description: The segment begins at a building corner marked with a skull logo, walking along a covered pedestrian walkway. The camera passes a COLA restaurant with outdoor seating on the left and a wide concrete staircase on the right. A pedestrian with an umbrella passes by at close range around the 5-second mark.

scene_state.functional_zone: back alley with vending machines and industrial dumpsters

events.description: pedestrian in gray tank top walks quickly past camera
exiting covered area into space with visible falling rain and pink neon glow ahead

agents.ego_description: walking through a narrow service alley passing green vending machines and large trash containers

segments.scene_description: The camera moves through a narrower back alley lined with vending machines on the left and industrial green dumpsters on the right. A pedestrian in a tank top passes by around 20 seconds. The environment transitions from fully covered to partially exposed as rain becomes visible toward the end of the segment.

scene_state.functional_zone: open pedestrian plaza with vibrant pink neon lighting

slowing slightly while navigating past seated pedestrians on benches

segments.scene_description: The camera turns left into a vibrant open plaza dominated by pink neon lighting. The scene features a yellow building facade on the left, digital billboards, and concrete benches where pedestrians are seated. The atmosphere shifts from industrial alley to commercial pedestrian zone with heavier foot traffic.

scene_state.functional_zone: construction zone with barricades and temporary market stall

approaching market vendor stall with red canopy and goods displayed

staircase leading upward with metal railings

segments.scene_description: The final segment moves through a construction zone with ATM machines on the right and scattered wooden pallets on the ground. The camera approaches a market stall with a vendor under a red canopy, while metal barricades block the path ahead. The environment becomes more cluttered with construction materials and temporary structures.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey that transitions from a sheltered urban walkway through a gritty industrial alley and into a vibrant, neon-lit commercial plaza. It begins at a building corner marked with a skull logo, moving past a COLA restaurant and a wide concrete staircase as a pedestrian with an umbrella passes by. The camera then drifts into a narrower back alley lined with vending machines and green dumpsters, where the overhead cover gradually disappears to reveal the falling rain. As the path opens up, the scene shifts left into a bright plaza dominated by pink neon lighting, digital billboards, and pedestrians resting on concrete benches. Finally, the movement leads through a cluttered construction zone filled with wooden pallets and ATMs before approaching a market vendor under a red canopy blocked by metal barricades.
